# compressDataUrl

## Summary
Re-encodes an image via canvas, lowering quality (and downscaling as a last resort) until it fits under `maxBytes`, while preserving the source format (a PNG stays a PNG). Returns null when no canvas is available so the caller falls back to the original. Keeps persisted generations small.

## Import
```js
import { compressDataUrl } from '../helpers/image';
```
